case_title: CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, AS vs. SHOUN, KAREN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY, AS SUBROGEE FOR BLANCA HOLCOMB AS TO DEFENDANT SHOUN, KAREN KARR, PAUL DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-22-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-21-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-02-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-22-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-22-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
